lyrics

the well crusted say i'm not to be trusted cuz i'm underdisgusted
i wonder who discussed it
wasn't me
i been busted too many times
to see something crooked and adjust it
nudging the lines so when the future comes in we can shine em
look at what us did, i told you i'm a diamond
you said i was suspect until i started rhyming, perfecting my timing, making too much sense for the environment i'm in
denial
the lines that you drew were the ones that i crossed
